title: Number of Employees Who Met the Target
titleCn: 满足目标工作时长的员工数目

testcases.input: hours = [0,1,2,3,4], target = 2 Output: 3 Explanation: The company wants each employee to work for at least 2 hours. - Employee 0 worked for 0 hours and didn't meet the target. - Employee 1 worked for 1 hours and didn't meet the target. - Employee 2 worked for 2 hours and met the target. - Employee 3 worked for 3 hours and met the target. - Employee 4 worked for 4 hours and met the target. There are 3 employees who met the target.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The company wants each employee to work for at least 2 hours. - Employee 0 worked for 0 hours and didn't meet the target. - Employee 1 worked for 1 hours and didn't meet the target. - Employee 2 worked for 2 hours and met the target. - Employee 3 worked for 3 hours and met the target. - Employee 4 worked for 4 hours and met the target. There are 3 employees who met the target.

testcases.input: hours = [5,1,4,2,2], target = 6 Output: 0 Explanation: The company wants each employee to work for at least 6 hours. There are 0 employees who met the target.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The company wants each employee to work for at least 6 hours. There are 0 employees who met the target.
